channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Why Morgan Stanley's CFO thinks tokenization is the next big step for its multi-trillion wealth business
item.description: Morgan Stanley CFO Sharon Yeshaya says the bank is eyeing a "tokenized world" where blockchain technology allows client assets and liabilities to move more efficiently across its wealth management platform.

item.title: 'Nothing Ever Happens': This Bot Always Bets 'No' on Polymarket, And It Has a Point
item.description: Sterling Crispin's 'Nothing Ever Happens' bot automatically buys "No" on every non-sports Polymarket it finds. It's not that crazy.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: New Bitcoin Proposal Would Freeze Coins to Counter Quantum Threat
item.description: The proposal would phase out Bitcoin's original security methods and freeze coins that don't move in time.

item.title: UK FCA seeks feedback on guidance for crypto rules ahead of 2027 rollout
item.description: The UK financial regulator has launched a consultation on crypto rules covering stablecoins, trading and staking ahead of a broader UK crypto regime expected to take effect in 2027.

item.title: Can AI Beat the Sports Betting Market? 8 of the Top Models Tried
item.description: KellyBench put Claude, GPT-5, Gemini, and Grok through a full Premier League season of betting. Not one turned a profit. Here's why.

item.title: Allbirds Stock Spikes 400% on Pivot From Shoe Brand to AI Compute—Yes, Really
item.description: Sustainable footwear company Allbirds will rebrand as NewBird AI and enter the GPU-as-a-service market. Investors love the pivot.

item.title: Tom Lee says ‘mini crypto winter’ is over, sees Ether above $60K
item.description: Bitmine chairman Tom Lee told Paris Blockchain Week that the recent crypto slump was a “mini crypto winter” and said Ether could climb above $60,000 over the next few years.

item.title: Allbirds abandons sneakers in pivot to AI computing, shares surge 400%
item.description: The footwear brand plans reinvention as Newbird AI with a $50 million convertible in a sign of the broader market shift into GPU infrastructure.

item.title: WLFI proposes unlock plan for 62 billion tokens with long lockups and burns
item.description: The new proposal outlines multi-year lockups and opt-in token burn, as the Trump-linked DeFi platform responds to pressure over delayed liquidity access.

item.title: TeraWulf stock declines on $900 million share sale to fund AI data center expansion
item.description: The shares had been on a big run higher, rising more than 50% since late March.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE rises 4.3% as trades flat
item.description: Aptos (APT), up 3.8% since Tuesday, joined Aave (AAVE) as a top performer.

item.title: Only 4% of Danish citizens hold crypto, far below other European countries
item.description: Only 4% of Danish citizens own crypto, far below other European countries, as banks, taxes and risk fears limit adoption, according to a new staff paper from the country's central bank.

item.title: Pakistan lifts seven-year ban, allowing banks to service crypto providers
item.description: Pakistan sent a letter to all banks and financial regulatory firms notifying them that they may provide crypto services,, but remain barred from trading or holding crypto assets.

item.title: Prediction market volumes to hit $1 trillion by 2030 with Robinhood, Coinbase as key players, Bernstein says
item.description: The broker said prediction markets are scaling into a trillion-dollar asset class, driven by regulatory clarity, crypto rails and distribution via major trading platforms.

item.title: Trump-backed WLFI moves to unlock 62 billion tokens after $75 million loan controversy
item.description: The project would burn 4.5 billion tokens while beginning to vest 40.7 billion tokens for founders and the team, restructuring locks that were originally set to be indefinite.

item.title: Elizabeth Warren Warns Elon Musk's X Money Threatens 'Stability of the Financial System'
item.description: The Massachusetts Senator warned of consumer protection gaps as Musk's payment platform launches amid weakened federal oversight.

item.title: 🔥 TOM LEE: “Ethereum is on its run to $60,000. You can get 25x for Ethereum,” at @ParisBlockWeek. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE43cE00Slp2UUtZREp1ZU43VURUNWgyS0NGZzBGa1Z5dGdGZTRnb3JPOWVBUF8tYnZ3TDRQTlo4RmhMTURQQkkyR2hPeW5ReXIta3ktal9qNUJPbEtiWVYwRFZrc0o?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 TOM LEE: “Ethereum is on its…

item.title: Morning Minute: The Next Fed Chair Has a Crypto Portfolio
item.description: Kevin Warsh is holding Solana, Polymarket and more. Goldman Sachs is filing for a BTC ETF. And Circle stock is jumping on news of a token.

item.title: The only chat crypto users actually need. 💬 🔸 Connect instantly 🔸 Transfer crypto in-chat 🔸 Share insights securely Know more → binance.com/en/support/ann… - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE9mdGJKVy1fRkpKM1pZV0xlMTFQcV94SF9PaG1fWXFHdTNSWkVLRkZqZ1piY1EzR2g2RlZadmJfRU53MTZrWmk5R3JZcWNNaUhUemFwTU9UcklxVmh5?oc=5" target="_blank">The only chat crypto users actually need. …

item.title: Income ETFs could be bitcoin’s volatility kill switch
item.description: What you need to know for April 15, 2026

item.title: Fireblocks launches tool for institutions to earn yield on stablecoins
item.description: Fireblocks launched Earn, giving institutions direct access to Aave and Morpho-based stablecoin lending as firms seek yield on idle balances.

item.title: Virginia Governor Signs Law Protecting Dormant Crypto From Forced Liquidation
item.description: The legislation ensures unclaimed digital assets are held in their native form for at least one year before the state can move to sell them.

item.title: Bitcoin pulls back as $75,000 remains 'both the milestone and the ceiling'
item.description: Bitcoin is struggling to break and hold above the key $75,000 resistance level while ether, solana decline.

item.title: Virginia updates law to hold unclaimed crypto in-kind for at least one year
item.description: Virginia signed a law bringing digital assets into unclaimed property rules, requiring in-kind transfer and limiting how quickly the state can sell them.

item.title: Pakistan allows banks to serve licensed crypto firms after years-long ban
item.description: Pakistan’s central bank has allowed banks to open accounts for licensed virtual asset service providers, ending years of restrictions and marking a shift toward a regulated framework.

item.title: EU adviser says ‘MiCA 2’ is likely as crypto market matures: PBW 2026
item.description: EU officials plan to reassess MiCA as companies test its limits, with industry feedback set to shape potential changes to the bloc’s crypto framework.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs Draw $411M After BTC Hits $75K, But Analysts Urge Caution
item.description: Analysts cited easing geopolitical tensions and improving liquidity as driving Bitcoin’s uptick, but warned of a “weak and unstable” market.

item.title: The 100% debt trap: Why the IMF’s latest warning is a massive long-term signal for bitcoin
item.description: The IMF warns that global public debt could reach about 100% of world GDP by 2029.

item.title: OKX rolls out X-Perps across Europe in regulated derivatives push
item.description: The exchange said the new product is available across the European Economic Area through its Malta-based MiFID business, with up to 10x leverage and multi-asset collateral.

item.title: EToro to acquire Zengo in self-custody push as CEO predicts $250K Bitcoin
item.description: EToro is set to acquire self-custodial wallet provider Zengo, and the trading platform’s CEO predicted a Bitcoin rally above $250,000 after another quarter of crypto market downside.

item.title: A new class of crypto treasury companies is forming around Strategy’s high-yield stock
item.description: Firms and protocols are accumulating Strategy’s preferred stock to capture yield and bitcoin-linked exposure.

item.title: Why this ex-Solana exec is using a Wall Street trick to level the playing field in DeFi
item.description: DoubleZero’s private fiber network aims to eliminate latency advantages like Hyperliquid’s Tokyo edge, but exchanges have yet to show an interest.

item.title: EToro to acquire crypto wallet Zengo in $70 million deal
item.description: The acquisition ties in the retail trading platform with advanced wallet technology meant to help protect users' assets.

item.title: Winklevoss Capital moves $43 million in bitcoin to custody after hitting lowest balance since 2012
item.description: Arkham data shows 572 BTC moved from Gemini's hot wallet to Winklevoss custody addresses in two transactions in 17 hours, reversing part of last month's $128.5 million deposit.

item.title: Ripple teams with Kyobo on South Korea tokenized bond settlement
item.description: Ripple and Kyobo Life are piloting tokenized government bond settlement as South Korea builds rules for token securities and digital asset payments.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs post $412M in inflows as Goldman Sachs files for BTC ETF
item.description: US-listed spot Bitcoin ETFs posted $411.5 million in inflows Tuesday as Goldman Sachs filed for a Bitcoin-linked ETF, lifting 2026 net flows back into positive territory.

item.title: MORGAN STANLEY IS BUYING BITCOIN Morgan Stanley is now on Arkham. The MSBT ETF has bought $83.6M of BTC since its inception this week, and currently holds $64.4M in its on-chain addresses. We are the first to publicly identify these on-chain addr - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE12UjRxc2ZnbEcxNGp6QTdEXzdXWm5oVFVnX0c5MlVwYkVkLURwWDRkMktDN1F6YjNROFJzUmI1RDU2RjdhMU1Vd2UyOU90cl91ZFA3YWlrV194QXc?oc=5" target="_blank">MORGAN STANLEY IS BUYING BITCOIN Morgan Sta…

item.title: SocGen brings MiCA-compliant USDCV dollar stablecoin to MetaMask
item.description: Societe Generale-FORGE said MetaMask will add its MiCA-compliant USDCV stablecoin, extending distribution for one of Europe’s bank-backed digital dollars.

item.title: Korea accounts for 30% of global crypto trading volume, with altcoins representing 85% of this activity, Bitcoin just 9%, and Ethereum 6%. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTFBjQ3Baa1hYZlpsSUdMNEZLTlNGTGIyTVprVHRQNlVwanNjT0pWektpWE43Nnh4dEJyZlV1aWxDZEFUbndiMzMtVUdkUEtxVDhhTjE1T3lJMGNycWtBUm0w?oc=5" target="_blank">Korea accounts for 30% of global crypt…

item.title: 🚨JUST IN: Bitcoin developers propose freezing coins in old wallets unless holders move funds to quantum-safe addresses. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFByeGh4QkpqZmZ0M3R3bUQ1U09xUEhTXzBkRHRNdi11NjQwMU9mZnE5aWd0c0VnNlgwZUxPSXVid3Bqd0RRQ2g3V0pIUnNDaVg5clB0cmtPeDF0WXBxd3FCdy1Qcw?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨JUST IN: Bitcoin developers pr…

item.title: North Korean hackers used AI-enabled social engineering in Zerion attack
item.description: It is the second long-term social-engineering attack this month, after the $280 million exploit of the Drift Protocol.

item.title: X rolls out smart cashtags in US, Canada in step toward ‘everything app’
item.description: Tat Thang, a partner at the prediction platform Polymarket, suggests X is building a Web3 equivalent of the Chinese WeChat Pay citing its recent moves to scrub crypto bots.

item.title: Crypto users targeted in ‘elaborate’ scam using popular notes app
item.description: Elastic Security Labs says a multi-step social engineering scam is aimed at those in crypto and finance, using a community plugin feature on a note-taking app to spread malicious device-controlling software.

item.title: Ethereum treasury firm Bitmine reports $3.8 billion Q1 loss in latest filing
item.description: The largest corporate ether holder posted a $3.8 billion quarterly loss as its pivot from mining to ETH accumulation continues.

item.title: Bitcoin developers are trying to build quantum defenses. Your coins could pay the price.
item.description: A proposal has been updated on Bitcoin's official repository, calling for freezing of quantum-vulnerable coins.

item.title: Apple removes fake Ledger app that stole $9.5M from crypto investors
item.description: Apple told Cointelegraph that the fake Ledger Live app was removed and that the developer was terminated from its app store.

item.title: Switzerland’s Crypto Valley funding rose 37% in 2025 as TON led deals
item.description: Crypto Valley raised $728 million across 31 deals in 2025, outpacing global blockchain funding growth as a $400 million TON deal lifted totals.

item.title: XRP climbs toward $1.38 as Japan's Rakuten integrates token for payments
item.description: Breakout backed by institutional flows and whale buying, with Japan adoption adding a fresh demand narrative.

item.title: Ether-bitcoin ratio bounces from 2026 lows, signaling broader crypto recovery
item.description: The ETH/BTC ratio hit its highest since January as Ethereum's network added 284,000 new users in Q1 and stablecoin supply reached a record $180 billion.

item.title: Bitcoiners propose freezing quantum-vulnerable coins in BIP-361
item.description: The authors described it as a “private incentive to upgrade” because lost or frozen coins will make everyone else’s coins worth slightly more.

item.title: SOL, ADA, DOGE pull back, bitcoin holds above $74,000 as Asia recoups Iran war losses
item.description: China's CSI 300 joins Taiwan and Singapore in erasing war-related declines as US-Iran talk optimism keeps oil below $100; spot ETFs posted $471 million in single-day inflows last week.

item.title: 1/ We're a quarter into 2026, and crypto hiring looks nothing like prior cycles. We just published our latest Talent Insights Report breaking down how we got here and what it means for founders and talent teams. 👇 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE5VT2RwcXNaWUhwT0MxQVU2WXFSMGFTbkM4SjNlcXBReFN0elg2Y2Y5N0VjY2ZZN3NzRnlILVpkT0tHLTF5NEpsZWxZVzN5dFdLQ0FXVEdHamctZGZj?oc=5" target="_blank">1/ We're a quarter into 2026, and crypto h…

item.title: 🚨 LATEST: A new study finds only 6.5% of crypto owners reported sales to the IRS, suggesting widespread tax underreporting among crypto investors, per Bloomberg. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1HVHI1T1kyY3lHakZiMkNsRWM1RXhmVkRzQkdZVkwtTktHSjFHRHE5SUZSbFBwVUFGMmppNlNwV1Bjc3o4cC12MEVtOHcxNkZRZ205bzl5NUJqc19pQlc3ZmoxVnk?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 LATEST: A new study finds on…

item.title: While Bitcoin debates whether to freeze vulnerable coins and Ethereum forms research committees, TRON is building. Today I'm announcing that TRON is officially launching its post-quantum upgrade initiative. TRON will be the first major public blockchain to - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE15N3dzTWRRMzNwOW5Ca1hHcDJaV3gxUkoyZndsVDRsVERWQnBkbG9fQ1lYTU5HY2NxblFvRnh2SHQ5UksxaUloNEpJd2wwMlR0anZjd09PYld0NmZBR1hvMWJSSC0?oc=5" target="_blank">While Bitcoin debates whether t…

item.title: Trump Is Hosting Another Meme Coin Gala—The Price for VIP Access Is Down 90%
item.description: Those seeking VIP treatment at the next Trump meme coin event didn't need to spend nearly as much as last time. Here's a breakdown of the numbers.

item.title: Ethereum DeFi Exchange CoW Swap Pauses Protocol Following Website Compromise
item.description: CoW Swap, a decentralized exchange used by Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin, paused its protocol after suffering a front-end attack.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 "Crypto Bros" appear to be dodging reporting sales to IRS, Bloomberg reports. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9Zem5kTlhvSDNIUnZldnUwZmV6a1Rub2hxSTBtSTNHOGdDMzQyenNNZnFhY3dENEdKUWtXNHJkXzd6TEcwbDVfZU5VdERteU1nV3hCVFVaa1lPQjFXX0pDaDd3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 "Crypto Bros" appear…

item.title: Visa Joins Stripe's Tempo Payments Network as 'Anchor' Validator
item.description: Visa joins Stripe and Zodia Custody by Standard Chartered as the first external validators for the Stripe-backed Tempo blockchain.

item.title: Bitcoin's $76,000 breakout fails but a rare signal is hinting at major market bottom
item.description: Derivatives funding rates have now remained negative for 46 days, a streak last seen following the FTX crash which marked the bottom of 2022's crypto winter.
